T1.name: 基础设施移植
T1.description: formatters, managers, widgets, event system 移植

T2.name: 对话中心主界面
T2.description: TuiState, render, event loop, engine 对接, approval, autocomplete

phase_name: Phase T — TUI OpenDev 整合
key_decisions: 类型统一：直接使用 octo-types + AgentEvent，零适配层
布局：对话中心 + 浮层调试，废弃 12-Tab 多屏
对接：与 REPL 共用 AgentExecutorHandle
完整特性：无 mock/stub，全部真实 engine 数据
回退策略：feature branch 开发，每 Task 一个 commit
notes: T1 COMPLETE (1d66ee7): All 10 infrastructure tasks done. Ported formatters (markdown, wrap, path_shortener, style_tokens, tool_registry, bash_formatter, file_formatter, diff), managers (spinner, message_history, display_ledger, interrupt), widgets (spinner, progress, input, status_bar, conversation, toast), event system (AppEvent + EventHandler). 459 octo-cli tests passing. Full workspace compiles clean. Next: T2-1 define TuiApp state structure.

deferred.description: Agent Skills 系统是否符合标准规范 — 专题研究
